text:
pgollucci    2012-03-09 02:22:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/rubygem-jeweler Makefile distinfo pkg-descr 
  Log:
  Jeweler provides the noble ruby developer with two primary features:
  
   * a library for managing and releasing RubyGem projects
   * a scaffold generator for starting new RubyGem projects
  
  WWW: http://github.com/technicalpickles/jeweler
  
  PR:             ports/165439
  Submitted by:   Douglas Thrift
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.4896    +1 -0      ports/devel/Makefile
  1.1       +29 -0     ports/devel/rubygem-jeweler/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +2 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-jeweler/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +6 -0      ports/devel/rubygem-jeweler/pkg-descr (new)
